Preparation of diluted orthophosphoric acid solution (10% v/v):
Add about 10 mL of orthophosphoric acid into a 100 mL volumetric flask.  Make up to the volume with water.  Mix well.
Transfer 2.0 mL of triethylamine into a 1000 mL of water, and mix well. Adjust the pH
8 ± 0.05 with diluted orthophosphoric acid solution. Filter it through 0.45 µ filter paper [Make: Millipore] and degas.
Transfer about 350 mL of buffer and 650 mL of Acetonitrile into a suitable container.  Mix well.  Sonicate to degas.
Transfer about 900 mL of water and 100 mL of Acetonitrile into a suitable container.  Mix well.  Sonicate to degas.
